summary.description: Base template for airplane semantic context. Use this to define common roles and expectations for different aircraft classes.

roles.main_structure: The primary fuselage or body of the aircraft. Usually static relative to the player position.
roles.wing_surface: Aerodynamic surfaces like main wings or ailerons. May have animations for control surfaces.
roles.tail_surface: Horizontal and vertical stabilizers, rudders, and elevators.
roles.engine_part: Engines, propellers, or turbine blades. Often have rotational animations.
roles.landing_gear: Wheels, struts, and bay doors. Often have complex retraction animations.
roles.weapon_mount: Hardpoints for guns, missiles, or bombs.
